name: Skyline
short_description: Clicker with good music and any choice you make can change your gameplay, you also have autoplay, you don't need to use the mouse, but you lose the chance to see all the secrets in the game (you can get all the achievements with autoplay) + WOMANS + ECONOMY + WORKSHOP + CHAT + VOICE CHAT + cases
detailed_description:
A clicker game with great music where every choice you make can change the gameplay. There is also an auto-clicker—you don’t need to use the mouse, but you might miss out on discovering all the game’s secrets (all achievements can be earned with the auto-clicker).

The game now features an item economy: each item has its own drop rate, and rare items can be traded and collected.

The game also includes professional multi-voice female voice acting!

Buy upgrades, skins, and prestiges. Once you reach over 1,000 prestiges, you can unlock a secret upgrade! Stay tuned for future updates!

Features:

  • Buy skins (Skyline, Reversed Skyline, Skyline Logo, My Photo and nothing)

  • Buy upgrades (Engine, Sky, Skai, Wheels, Something, Extra Car)

  • Click on Skyline

  • Listen to music (adjustable volume)

  • Buy prestiges

  • Item economy with a drop and trading system

  • WORKSHOP

  • Chat

  • Voice Chat

  • cases

Stay tuned for new updates!
